name: Appetizer Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all ingredients as listed.
2. Mix pork with cornstarch, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add pork mixture and cook until browned, stirring occasionally (about 5 minutes).
5. Add onions and mushrooms; stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes.
6. Stir in sprouts, currants, almonds, sherry, and soy sauce; cook for 1 minute.
7. Place a portion of the filling on each egg roll wrapper.
8. Fold and roll up the wrappers tightly to form the egg rolls.
9. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to about 350°F (175°C).
10. Fry egg rolls until golden brown, turning occasionally, for about 3-4 minutes per side.
11. Remove from oil with tongs and drain on paper towels.
12. Serve hot with your choice of dipping sauce.
